No SSL?

  • Thread starter CRKrueger
  • Start date Apr 27, 2017

CRKrueger

Eläytyminatör
Joined
Apr 25, 2017
Messages
14,645
Reaction score
36,483
  • Apr 27, 2017
  • #1
Noticing we don't have basic encryption to safeguard passwords, etc. Not that that's a big deal or anything, but just wondering if you're looking into it?
 

Endless Flight

Dog Dad
Administrator
Moderator
Joined
Apr 24, 2017
Messages
17,385
Reaction score
48,411
  • Apr 27, 2017
  • #2
I'll take a look and see if it's easy to implement for Xenforo. I'm not sure if you use Chrome but I see that Google implemented a warning this year to users who put their passwords in sites that don't have SSL. I'll see what they cost and see if I can implement it.
